microui.core.AbstractButton

Packages that use AbstractButton

Description
microui.component
 
microui.core
 

  • Uses of AbstractButton in microui.component

    Subclasses of AbstractButton in microui.component
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Button
    Represents a clickable button component with text and/or image content.
    class 
    CheckBox
    A CheckBox component that represents a binary state (checked or unchecked).
    final class 
    MenuButton
    A hierarchical menu button component that can contain both plain items and sub-menus.

  • Uses of AbstractButton in microui.core

    Methods in microui.core that return AbstractButton
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    AbstractButton
    AbstractButton.setHoverColor(AbstractColor color)
    Sets the color of the hover effect.
    final AbstractButton
    AbstractButton.setHoverEnabled(boolean isEnabled)
    Enables or disables hover effects.
    final AbstractButton
    AbstractButton.setHoverSpeed(float speed)
    Sets the animation speed of the hover effect.
    final AbstractButton
    AbstractButton.setRipplesColor(AbstractColor color)
    Sets the color of the ripple effects.
    final AbstractButton
    AbstractButton.setRipplesEnabled(boolean isEnabled)
    Enables or disables ripple effects.
    final AbstractButton
    AbstractButton.setStrokeColor(AbstractColor color)
    Sets the stroke color (border color) of the button.
    final AbstractButton
    AbstractButton.setStrokeWeight(int weight)
    Sets the stroke weight (border thickness) of the button.
